_comment: Per-paper citation notes. Each key maps an author-date citation to its full + shortened Chicago note and the regex patterns that match it in the drafts. mode A keeps the captured author name and appends the marker; mode B replaces the parenthetical with the marker only.

peng.full: Sida Peng et al., "The Impact of AI on Developer Productivity: Evidence from GitHub Copilot" (arXiv preprint 2302.06590, 2023).
peng.short: Peng et al., "The Impact of AI on Developer Productivity."

bryn.full: Erik Brynjolfsson et al., "Canaries in the Coal Mine? Six Facts about the Recent Employment Effects of Artificial Intelligence" (working paper, Stanford Digital Economy Lab, 2025).
bryn.short: Brynjolfsson et al., "Canaries in the Coal Mine?"

lewis.full: Patrick Lewis et al., "Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks," in Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 33 (2020): 9459–9474.

yao.full: Shunyu Yao et al., "ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models" (paper presented at the International Conference on Learning Representations, 2023).

jimenez.full: Carlos E. Jimenez et al., "SWE-bench: Can Language Models Resolve Real-World GitHub Issues?" (paper presented at the International Conference on Learning Representations, 2024).

swelb.full: SWE-bench Verified public leaderboard (accessed June 2026), late-2025 results for frontier coding systems (resolution rates of roughly 75 to 85 percent depending on scaffold); leaderboard figures are vendor-reported and not peer-reviewed.

yu.full: Boxi Yu et al., "SWE-ABS: Adversarial Benchmark Strengthening Exposes Inflated Success Rates on Test-Based Benchmarks" (arXiv preprint 2603.00520, 2026).

metr.full: METR, "Measuring the Impact of Early-2025 AI on Experienced Open-Source Developer Productivity" (research report, 2025), arXiv preprint 2507.09089; METR notes that these early-2025 results are a point-in-time snapshot, since revised by later measurements.
metr.short: METR, "Measuring the Impact of Early-2025 AI."

gitclear.full: GitClear, AI Copilot Code Quality: 2025 Look Back at 12 Months of Data (industry research report, 2025).

bb.full: Alberto Bacchelli and Christian Bird, "Expectations, Outcomes, and Challenges of Modern Code Review," in Proceedings of the 35th International Conference on Software Engineering (2013).
bb.short: Bacchelli and Bird, "Expectations, Outcomes, and Challenges of Modern Code Review."

sadowski.full: Caitlin Sadowski et al., "Modern Code Review: A Case Study at Google," in Proceedings of the 40th International Conference on Software Engineering: Software Engineering in Practice (2018).

dibiase.full: Marco di Biase et al., "The Effects of Change Decomposition on Code Review: A Controlled Experiment," PeerJ Computer Science 5 (2019): e193.
dibiase.short: di Biase et al., "The Effects of Change Decomposition on Code Review."

cohen.full: Jason Cohen, Best Kept Secrets of Peer Code Review (Austin, TX: Smart Bear, 2006).
cohen.short: Cohen, Best Kept Secrets of Peer Code Review.

doshi.full: Anil R. Doshi and Oliver P. Hauser, "Generative AI Enhances Individual Creativity but Reduces the Collective Diversity of Novel Content," Science Advances 10, no. 28 (2024): eadn5290.
doshi.short: Doshi and Hauser, "Generative AI Enhances Individual Creativity."

padma.full: Vishakh Padmakumar and He He, "Does Writing with Language Models Reduce Content Diversity?" (paper presented at the International Conference on Learning Representations, 2024).
padma.short: Padmakumar and He, "Does Writing with Language Models Reduce Content Diversity?"

anderson.full: Barrett R. Anderson et al., "Homogenization Effects of Large Language Models on Human Creative Ideation," in Proceedings of the 16th Conference on Creativity & Cognition (2024).
anderson.short: Anderson et al., "Homogenization Effects of Large Language Models."

huh.full: Minyoung Huh et al., "Position: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis" (paper presented at the International Conference on Machine Learning, 2024).
huh.short: Huh et al., "Position: The Platonic Representation Hypothesis."

kanter.full: Rosabeth Moss Kanter, "Ten Reasons People Resist Change," Harvard Business Review (online), September 25, 2012.

bower.full: Joseph L. Bower and Clayton M. Christensen, "Disruptive Technologies: Catching the Wave," Harvard Business Review 73, no. 1 (1995): 43–53.

huy.full: Quy Nguyen Huy, "In Praise of Middle Managers," Harvard Business Review 79, no. 8 (2001): 72–81.

becker.full: Gary S. Becker, Human Capital: A Theoretical and Empirical Analysis, with Special Reference to Education (New York: Columbia University Press, 1964).

eu.full: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 of the European Parliament and of the Council (Artificial Intelligence Act), art. 14 (human oversight), esp. art. 14(1) and art. 14(4)(b).

march.full: James G. March, "Exploration and Exploitation in Organizational Learning," Organization Science 2, no. 1 (1991): 71–87.

janis.full: Irving L. Janis, Victims of Groupthink: A Psychological Study of Foreign-Policy Decisions and Fiascoes (Boston: Houghton Mifflin, 1972).

autor.full: David H. Autor, "Why Are There Still So Many Jobs? The History and Future of Workplace Automation," Journal of Economic Perspectives 29, no. 3 (2015): 3–30.
autor.short: Autor, "Why Are There Still So Many Jobs?"

bessen.full: James Bessen, "Automation and Jobs: When Technology Boosts Employment," Economic Policy 34, no. 100 (2019): 589–626.

dakhel.full: Arghavan Moradi Dakhel et al., "GitHub Copilot AI Pair Programmer: Asset or Liability?" Journal of Systems and Software (2023).
dakhel.short: Moradi Dakhel et al., "GitHub Copilot AI Pair Programmer."

cui.full: Zheyuan Cui et al., "The Effects of Generative AI on High-Skilled Work: Evidence from Three Field Experiments with Software Developers," Management Science (2025).
cui.short: Cui et al., "The Effects of Generative AI on High-Skilled Work."

perry.full: Neil Perry et al., "Do Users Write More Insecure Code with AI Assistants?" in Proceedings of the 2023 ACM SIGSAC Conference on Computer and Communications Security (2023): 2785–2799.
perry.short: Perry et al., "Do Users Write More Insecure Code with AI Assistants?"

dora.full: DORA, Accelerate State of DevOps Report 2024 (Google Cloud, 2024).
dora.short: DORA, Accelerate State of DevOps Report 2024.
